title: BG Electrical Double Switched Power Plug Wall Socket, Nexus Metal, Brushed Steel, Grey Inserts, 13A, NBS22G
features: SLEEK AND SLIM BRUSHED STEEL DOUBLE SWITCHED POWER SOCKET: With double pole switching for peace of mind and safer installation
PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners, and a slim profile – combining quality with modern elegance
ANGLED IN-LINE COLOUR CODED CAPTIVE SCREW TERMINALS: Makes it incredibly easy to install and to connect the wires. Fits a 25mm back box, ideal for retrofit
FIXED INTEGRATED PLASTIC GASKET TO PROTECT METAL EDGES FROM MOISTURE: With no visible plastic to be seen around the switches
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
